race.comment: BOLLINGER MISS (1) flew home to win first-up over 1200m at Doomben. Stepped up to Saturday company last start in town and caught the eye at the end of 1350m, beaten less than three lengths. Cherry ripe now and perfectly placed back in this company. SUBTERRAIN (3) quickened nicely to get the prize over DUOMO when fresh from a spell at this trip at Eagle Farm last time out. Promising four-year-old who scored at the same stage last prep. Should hold the good form and play a major role. MARAGICAL (4) has returned a string of decent figures this prep without winning. Gets a bit of weight relief with Youngberry's claim which could prove the difference. DUOMO (6) was only 0.6 lengths off SUBTERRAIN last time out and gets a 1.5kgs weight swing. That brings him under notice. HELLO LOVELY (7) has been freshened up and saves her best for the Gold Coast. A return to form will not surprise.
